execution_environment.execution_rule: After you form a plan for the analysis, execute that plan in Galaxy.

user_prompt: I have two TSV files from a cancer study and I want to know if I can predict which patients respond to treatment. I am not sure what kind of analysis I should run in Galaxy or which settings make sense. Please look at the files, figure out a good approach, run it in Galaxy, and tell me how well it works on the test file.
